title: Darden Restaurants Stock Could Near Annual Highs
text: Olive Garden parent Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) reported better-than-expected fiscal-second quarter earnings and revenue on Dec. 16.

title: Darden (DRI) Q2 Earnings & Revenue Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Darden's (DRI) second-quarter fiscal 2023 top line reflects solid segmental performance backed by comps growth and new store openings.

title: Darden Restaurants (DRI) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Darden Restaurants (DRI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.80% and 2.45%, respectively, for the quarter ended November 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Darden profit falls but beats estimate
text: Darden Restaurants Inc. beat analyst estimates for profit and revenue on Friday, but the results failed to lift the stock price.

title: Darden's Earnings Beat Forecasts. Olive Garden and LongHorn Drive Sales.
text: The restaurant-chains company posts $2.49 billion in second-quarter total sales, while analysts had anticipated $2.43 billion.

title: Olive Garden parent company Darden beats estimates, raises outlook
text: Darden Restaurants, the parent company of Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse, raised its outlook for the year.

title: Olive Garden parent Darden Restaurants posts lower profit but beats estimates, shares rise
text: Darden Restaurants Inc. shares rose 1.7% in premarket trades Friday after the company beat analyst estimates for second-quarter earnings and revenue. Darden said its second-quarter profit fell to $187.2 million, or $1.52 a share, from $193.2 million, or $1.48 a share in the year-ago quarter.

title: Earnings Previews: Accenture, Adobe, Darden Restaurants
text: The three major U.S. equity indexes closed higher on Tuesday. After a blistering start to the day, equities lost their steam as traders curbed their enthusiasm for the good consumer price index report.

title: Darden Restaurants (DRI) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
text: Darden Restaurants (DRI) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
